## What & why

Describe what this PR changes and the motivation. Link related issues
(`Fixes #123`).

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (or `npm run test:unit` if you can't run integration locally)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Did not add runtime dependencies (the stack is pure Node, no native deps)
- [ ] Updated docs (README / CLAUDE.md / CHANGELOG) where relevant

## Notes for reviewers

Anything worth calling out — trade-offs, follow-ups, areas needing scrutiny.
